In /home/bitzaven/CodingProjects/pi-threads, check git status and current branch. If currently on main/master, create and switch to a new feature branch named refactor/explicit-run-state-machine. If already on another branch, report the branch name and whether the working tree is clean. Do not modify anything else.

content.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /home/bitzaven/CodingProjects/pi-threads && branch=$(git branch --show-current) && clean=true && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain=v1)" ]; then clean=false; fi && echo "branch=$branch" && echo "clean=$clean" && if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then git switch -c refactor/explicit-run-state-machine && echo "created_and_switched=refactor/explicit-run-state-machine"; else echo "no_branch_change=true"; fi
